What entities are present and what are they doing during the ingredient preparation?
canonical_answer: A clear glass bowl rests on a light brown wooden surface while a hand pours yellow butter from a small white bowl into the container using a metal spoon. White granulated sugar is subsequently added to the butter before dark brown granular sugar is dropped into the bowl on top of the existing mixture. Text overlays specify the measurements for each ingredient throughout the process.

Describe the sequence of ingredients added to the mixing bowl during the preparation phase, noting the specific actions and timestamps for each addition.
canonical_answer: At 6s, a hand places a clear glass bowl on the wooden table; at 8s, yellow butter is scraped from a small white bowl into the large glass bowl; at 12s, white granulated sugar is poured onto the butter; at 16s, dark brown sugar is added to the mixture.
